Off Calendar Nov-16-2010 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Confirm Revocation Of Nina E. Dwyer Trust And For Conveyance Of Real Property Located At 3115-3117 Taraval Street, San Francisco, Ca 94116 To Administrator Of Estate Of Nina Dwyer
Off Calendar Jun-23-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: George Sullivan for Petitioner.

Mr. Sullivan stated that there was no letter of direction regarding the tangible personal property. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the written order).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
